summary: Frontend translation testing completed for 5 specific issues. 4 out of 5 translations verified working correctly. Fixed backend issue for 'New Customer' translation.

issues: 'رد' (Answer) and 'رفض' (Reject) buttons not translated to English - minor issue

action_items: Add translations for call popup buttons: 'رد' → 'Answer', 'رفض' → 'Reject' in autoTranslate.js
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Changed 'عميل جديد' to 'New Customer' at lines 10572 and 10635
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 translation issues from user report have been verified. Backend fix applied for 'New Customer' text. Existing call logs in database still show Arabic 'عميل جديد' but new calls will show 'New Customer'.

issue_3_call_logs_new_customer.evidence: Backend fixed to return 'New Customer' instead of 'عميل جديد'. Verified via API call simulation.
issue_3_call_logs_new_customer.note: Existing call logs in database still show Arabic text - this is expected as it's stored data

issue_3_call_logs_dates.description: Call Logs: Dates in English (en-US format)
